capabilities.justification: The prototype opens a local TCP listener through tcp-runtime so clients can speak RESP over real sockets.
The prototype launches the Python Mini Redis worker as a child process to prove the cross-language runtime seam.
Tests may read PYTHON to select an explicit Python 3.12 interpreter for the worker process.

justification: This crate intentionally owns the TCP listener and child worker process for the Python Mini Redis over Rust TCP runtime prototype.
